name: Oracle Audit Vault and Database Firewall
description: Integrates with Oracle Audit Vault and Database Firewall (AVDF) REST API for audit data collection, database firewall policy management, and compliance reporting across Oracle and non-Oracle databases

actions.name: List Audit Events
actions.description: Retrieve database audit events collected from monitored targets including login events, DDL, and DML operations

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: eventCategory
parameters.description: Filter by event category (login, ddl, dml, system)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List Firewall Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured database firewall policies for SQL traffic inspection and enforcement

actions.name: List Monitored Targets
actions.description: Retrieve all registered database targets being monitored by AVDF

parameters.name: targetType
parameters.description: Filter by target type (Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, DB2, PostgreSQL)

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve security alerts generated by audit vault and database firewall policy violations

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (critical, warning, informational)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Search Activity
actions.description: Search database activity for specific SQL operations, users, or access patterns across all monitored targets

actions.name: Get Compliance Report
actions.description: Generate and retrieve a compliance report for regulatory frameworks such as PCI DSS, SOX, GDPR, or HIPAA
